description: From the manufacturer Bostik Super Glue Liquid High strength liquid super glue that bonds in seconds Bostik Super Glue Liquid is a fast curing adhesive that forms an ultra strong, long lasting bond with most materials in seconds. It comes in a convenient tube with a precision nozzle for easy application. Suitable materials Bostik Super Glue Liquid is suitable for bonding most materials, including wood, porcelain and ceramics, many rubbers, most common metals, some types of jewellery and most plastics.
